# Longevity performance coaching lab — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A science-backed health and fitness coaching brand targeting men aged 40–60+ who are stuck in chronic dieting cycles, struggling with low testosterone, inflammation, and metabolic slowdown. The brand blends nutritional science, exercise physiology, hormone health, and behavioral psychology into a structured, empathetic, no-nonsense 90-day transformation methodology called 'Metabolic Priming.' The tone is authoritative yet approachable — like a knowledgeable coach who genuinely understands the frustrations of aging men trying to get lean and healthy again.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://longevity-performance-coaching-lab-83aacfa3.zappy5.app
Break free from chronic dieting and metabolic slowdown with Metabolic Priming. Science-backed body transformation for men 40-60+ ready to reclaim their edge. Start now.

### Services
https://longevity-performance-coaching-lab-83aacfa3.zappy5.app/services
A no-nonsense fusion of nutrition science, hormone optimization, and behavioral coaching designed to end inflammation and restart fat loss for aging men.

### About
https://longevity-performance-coaching-lab-83aacfa3.zappy5.app/about
Meet the methodology that blends exercise physiology with real empathy. We help men 40+ escape the dieting hamster wheel and build sustainable, lean strength.

### Contact
https://longevity-performance-coaching-lab-83aacfa3.zappy5.app/contact
Ready to ditch low energy and stubborn fat? Reach out and lock in your personalized 90-day Metabolic Priming strategy. Your comeback starts with one message.

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://longevity-performance-coaching-lab-83aacfa3.zappy5.app/contact
- Endpoint: https://longevity-performance-coaching-lab-83aacfa3.zappy5.app/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Longevity performance coaching lab
A science-backed health and fitness coaching brand targeting men aged 40–60+ who are stuck in chronic dieting cycles, struggling with low testosterone, inflammation, and metabolic slowdown. The brand blends nutritional science, exercise physiology, hormone health, and behavioral psychology into a structured, empathetic, no-nonsense 90-day transformation methodology called 'Metabolic Priming.' The tone is authoritative yet approachable — like a knowledgeable coach who genuinely understands the frustrations of aging men trying to get lean and healthy again.

## Services/Products
- 90-Day Metabolic Priming Program
- Nutrition coaching (anti-inflammatory diet, protein targeting)
- Strength training programming
- Hormone health guidance
- Supplement recommendations
- Mindset and behavioral coaching

## Target Audience
- men over 40, especially 50+, dealing with weight loss plateaus, inflammation, autoimmune issues, and hormonal decline
- Men Over 50 Health Challengers
- Executive Men Under Pressure
- Retired Active Lifestyle Men

## Industry
Health & Wellness

- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://longevity-performance-coaching-lab-83aacfa3.zappy5.app/llms-full.txt
